title: Login with valid credentials reaches dashboard
description: Verifies a staff user can log in with correct credentials and reach the authenticated dashboard view.

title: Invalid credentials show error and remain on login
description: Verifies invalid login attempts display an error message and do not navigate away from the login page.

title: Wrong password for a valid-looking user shows invalid credentials error
description: Verifies entering a plausible account email with an incorrect password shows an invalid credentials error and stays on login.

title: Empty email prevents successful login and shows required validation
description: Verifies the login form does not submit successfully when the email field is left empty.

steps.description: Verify text "Email is required" is visible

title: Empty password prevents successful login and shows required validation
description: Verifies the login form does not submit successfully when the password field is left empty.

steps.description: Verify text "Password is required" is visible

title: Invalid email format shows validation and blocks login
description: Verifies an improperly formatted email triggers a visible validation message and does not proceed to the dashboard.

steps.description: Verify text "Enter a valid email" is visible

title: Login submission via Enter key works with valid credentials
description: Verifies submitting the login form using the Enter key logs the user in successfully.

title: Password field masks input characters on login form
description: Verifies the password input is visually masked to protect sensitive entry.

steps.description: Verify element "Password input masked" is visible

title: Complete a POS checkout with customer selection and cash payment
description: Verifies a user can add a product to the cart, proceed to checkout, select a customer, pay successfully, and see a success receipt state.

steps.description: Click on the first visible product in the product list

title: Attempt checkout with empty cart is blocked
description: Verifies the POS prevents proceeding to checkout when no items are in the cart.

steps.description: Verify text "Cart is empty" is visible

title: Selecting products loads and allows adding multiple items to the cart
description: Verifies the product list is visible and adding more than one item results in a visible cart with multiple line items or updated quantity.

steps.description: Click on the first visible product in the product list
Click on the second visible product in the product list

title: Customer selection step is required before confirming payment (when customer selector is present)
description: Verifies the checkout flow enforces selecting a customer before payment confirmation when the UI includes a customer selector.

steps.description: Click on the first visible product in the product list

title: Cancel out of checkout returns to cart without completing payment
description: Verifies a user can exit/cancel the checkout screen and is returned to the cart with items preserved.

steps.description: Click on the first visible product in the product list

title: Payment success shows a visible success message/receipt state
description: Verifies that after confirming payment, the UI displays a visible success indicator such as a receipt, order number, or confirmation message.

steps.description: Click on the first visible product in the product list

title: View kitchen orders list from Cocina
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open Cocina and see a visible list of incoming orders.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Verify an order card in the incoming orders list is visible

title: Open an order card to view order details
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open an order card from Cocina and see order details.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Verify an order card in the incoming orders list is visible
Click on the first visible order card

title: Mark an order as Ready and verify status update
description: Verifies the kitchen user can mark an order as ready and see the status updated to Ready on the UI.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on the first visible order card
Click the "Mark order as ready" button

title: Mark order as Ready from within the order card view
description: Verifies the Ready action is available after opening an order card and updates the order status on the card.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on the first visible order card
Verify element "Mark order as ready" is visible
Click the "Mark order as ready" button

title: Disconnected indicator blocks marking order Ready and shows connection error
description: Verifies that when the realtime disconnected indicator is shown, attempting to mark an order ready displays a connection error message.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click the "Mark order as ready" button

title: Retry connection from disconnected state and verify indicator clears
description: Verifies the user can retry the realtime connection and the disconnected indicator is no longer shown after recovery.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field

title: Realtime disconnected state shows visible banner/indicator in Cocina
description: Verifies the Cocina screen clearly shows a realtime disconnected indicator when the connection is lost.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Verify element "Realtime connection status indicator" is visible

title: After marking Ready, order appears with updated status in the orders list
description: Verifies that after an order is marked Ready, the orders list reflects the Ready status for that order card.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on the first visible order card
Click the "Mark order as ready" button
Verify the same order card shows status text "Ready" in the orders list

title: Create a new customer successfully and see it in the list
description: Verifies a user can add a customer from the Customers screen and the new record appears in the customers list.

title: Save a new customer after completing required fields
description: Verifies the Add Customer form can be completed and saved without errors.

title: Validation: required fields blank shows error and stays on form
description: Verifies required field validation prevents saving a customer when mandatory fields are empty.

title: Validation message is visible after failed save
description: Verifies a visible validation error is shown after attempting to save with missing required fields.

title: Cancel/close customer creation returns to customers list
description: Verifies the user can exit the Add Customer flow without saving and return to the customers list screen.

title: Customers list loads and is viewable
description: Verifies the customers list screen renders and shows a visible list/table area for customer records.

title: Create a reservation and confirm it appears in the agenda
description: Verifies a user can create a new reservation from the Reservations section and see it listed in the agenda.

title: Save a reservation with valid details
description: Verifies the reservation form accepts valid inputs and successfully saves.

steps.description: Fill "John Test" into the customer name field

title: Attempt to create reservation with overlapping/invalid time shows validation error
description: Verifies the system blocks saving when the time is invalid or overlaps, and shows a visible validation error.

steps.description: Fill "Invalid Time Booking" into the customer name field
Fill "00:00" into the reservation time field

title: Saving with invalid/overlapping time keeps user on form and displays error
description: Verifies clicking Save with invalid/overlapping time does not create the reservation and keeps the user on the form with an error message visible.

title: Reservation list/agenda loads successfully in Reservations section
description: Verifies the Reservations agenda screen loads and shows reservation content area after navigating from the sidebar.

title: Update inventory stock for an existing product and verify updated value is shown
description: Verifies a user can open Inventory, update a product stock quantity, save, and see the updated stock level reflected in the UI.

title: Select a product from the inventory list and open its stock editor
description: Verifies a user can select a product in Inventory and reach the stock editing area for that product.

steps.description: Click on the first product in the product list

title: Save a positive stock quantity change and confirm the new value is displayed
description: Verifies that saving a valid (non-negative) stock quantity updates the visible stock level for the selected product.

steps.description: Click on the first product in the product list

title: Save valid stock update and verify confirmation or updated stock level on screen
description: Verifies that after clicking Save, the UI shows a successful outcome (updated stock level visible or a success message).

steps.description: Click on the first product in the product list

title: Verify updated stock value is visible after saving (end-to-end)
description: Verifies the updated stock level is displayed after saving a valid change, indicating the UI reflects the new quantity.

steps.description: Click on the first product in the product list

title: Reject negative stock value and show validation error
description: Verifies entering a negative stock quantity prevents saving and shows a validation error message.

steps.description: Click on the first product in the product list

title: Negative stock value does not change displayed stock level after failed save
description: Verifies that after a negative value validation error, the stock level shown remains unchanged on screen.

steps.description: Click on the first product in the product list

title: Inventory list loads and is usable after initial fetch
description: Verifies Inventory page loads without empty-state errors and presents at least one selectable product entry.

steps.description: Click on the first product in the product list

title: Open History from sidebar and view past orders list
description: Verifies an authenticated user can access Historial and see a visible list of past orders.

steps.description: Verify element "Past orders list" is visible

title: Filter History by a specific date and see filtered orders
description: Verifies applying a date filter reduces the visible orders to match the selected date.

steps.description: Verify element "Past orders list" is visible
Select "Today" from the date filter options
Verify element "Past orders list" is visible

title: Date range filter that returns no results shows empty state
description: Verifies the History page shows an empty state message when filters yield no orders.

steps.description: Select "10 years ago" from the date picker
Select "9 years ago" from the date picker
Verify element "Past orders list" is not visible

title: Adjust filters after empty state to recover results
description: Verifies the user can change filters after an empty result and see orders appear again.

steps.description: Select "10 years ago" from the date picker
Select "9 years ago" from the date picker
Select "30 days ago" from the date picker
Verify element "Past orders list" is visible

title: Invalid date range (end date before start date) is blocked or shows validation
description: Verifies the UI prevents or clearly communicates an invalid date range selection.

steps.description: Verify text "Invalid date range" is visible

title: History list remains accessible after applying and clearing date filters
description: Verifies the user can clear the applied date filters and return to the unfiltered list.

steps.description: Verify element "Past orders list" is visible
Select "Today" from the date filter options
Verify element "Past orders list" is visible

title: Open Reports and view KPIs and charts
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the Reports page and see KPI tiles and charts.

title: Adjust timeframe and confirm charts update
description: Verifies changing the timeframe control updates the visible report output.

steps.description: Select "Últimos 7 días" from the timeframe dropdown

title: Reports shows loading state while fetching analytics
description: Verifies a loading spinner/indicator is shown when opening Reports before data renders.

title: Timeframe control is available on Reports page
description: Verifies the Reports page exposes a timeframe filter/control for analytics.

title: Create a new user with a valid role and see it in the users list
description: Verifies an admin can add a staff user with a valid role and the new user appears in the list.

title: Open Add User form from Users list
description: Verifies the Add User action opens a user creation form for entering user details and role.

title: Save a new user and verify the new row is visible in the list
description: Verifies saving a new user with valid required details shows the user in the users list afterwards.

title: Assign role when creating a new user
description: Verifies the role can be selected during user creation and the chosen role is visible for the created user.

title: Attempt to create a user with an invalid email and see a validation message
description: Verifies the UI blocks saving when the email is invalid and shows a visible validation/error message.

title: Attempt to create a user with a duplicate email and see an error message
description: Verifies saving a user with an email that already exists shows a visible duplicate/constraint error.

title: Verify Users list loads and is visible after navigating via sidebar
description: Verifies the users list view is reachable from the sidebar and displays a list/table area for users.

title: Open cash register with a valid opening amount
description: Verifies a user can open the cash register and see the status change to Open.

steps.description: Type "100" into the opening amount field

title: Prevent opening register when opening amount is empty
description: Verifies the opening action is blocked and a validation message is shown when no opening amount is provided.

title: Prevent opening register when opening amount is non-numeric
description: Verifies the opening action is blocked and a validation message is shown for an invalid opening amount format.

steps.description: Type "abc" into the opening amount field

title: Cancel opening register and remain not-opened
description: Verifies a user can back out of opening the register and the register does not become Open.

title: Attempt to close register with pending transactions shows warning and blocks closing
description: Verifies closing is prevented when pending transactions exist and a warning is displayed.

title: Dismiss pending-transactions warning when trying to close register
description: Verifies the user can dismiss the warning dialog and remains on the cash register screen without closing.

title: Open a free table from the map
description: Verifies that selecting a free table allows opening it for seating.

steps.description: Click on a free table in the table map

title: Add an order to an opened table
description: Verifies that once a table is opened, the user can add at least one item to the table order.

steps.description: Click on a free table in the table map

title: Table map loads and displays tables list after entering Salón
description: Verifies that the floor map renders and shows tables after navigating to the Salón section.

title: Selecting a table highlights it and shows table details
description: Verifies that clicking a table on the map selects it and shows its details/actions panel.

steps.description: Click on any table in the table map

title: Create a percentage promotion and verify it appears in the list
description: Verifies a user can create a new percentage-based promotion, save it, and see it listed in Promotions.

title: Save a 2x1 promotion and verify it appears in the list
description: Verifies a user can create a 2x1-style promotion with a validity period and see it listed after saving.

steps.description: Select "2x1" from the promotion type dropdown

title: Attempt to save overlapping promotion rules and verify conflict warning blocks save
description: Verifies overlapping/duplicate promotion rules trigger a visible conflict validation and prevent saving.

title: Cancel promotion creation without saving and verify user returns to Promotions list
description: Verifies the user can exit the create promotion screen without saving and remains on the Promotions area.

title: Verify Promotions list loads and shows existing promotions state
description: Verifies the Promotions page loads successfully and shows either existing promotions or an empty-state message.

title: Required-field validation: attempt to save with missing details and verify inline errors
description: Verifies the create promotion form prevents saving when required fields are missing and shows visible validation messages.

title: Create a percent promotion with validity dates and verify dates are shown in list row/details
description: Verifies saving a promotion with a validity window results in visible date/range information in the Promotions UI.

steps.description: Select "Percent" from the promotion type dropdown

title: Conflict handling: overlapping validity period triggers visible warning message
description: Verifies defining overlapping validity (time/date range) causes a visible conflict warning on save attempt.
